title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, March 05 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 05/03/2024
Image reference: 2024-03-05_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-march-05-2024_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulk carrier values continue to firm after strong sale prices of vessels such as Shin Koryu, The Prosperity and Bulk Monaco
Capesize (Newcastlemax) Shin Koryu (208,000 DWT, Oct 2009, Universal) to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 32.75 mil, VV Value USD 30.46 mil
Panamax BC The Prosperity (81,900 DWT, Jan 2017, Tsuneishi Zhoushan) sold to unknown European buyers for USD 31.50 mil, VV Values USD 29.24 mil
Supramax BC Bulk Monaco (63,700 DWT, Jun 2023, Shin Kasado Dock) sold to CTM Deher for USD 40.5 mil, VV Value USD 39.69 mil
Tankers: Tanker values remained stable across the board last week
MR2 (Chem/Product) Piura Pacific (49,800 DWT, Mar 2024, K Shipbuilding) sold to Unknown Singaporean for USD 49 mil, VV Value USD 50.39 mil
Containers: Secondhand values appreciated across the board driven by higher earnings
No notable sales last week
Image reference: 2024-03-05_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-march-05-2024_img2.jpg
